commands.review_summary:
The PR advances the iMessage catch-up cursor from resolved live messages, coordinates startup catch-up/live overlap, and adds monitor, catch-up, coalescing, and docs coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main persists the iMessage catch-up cursor only from catch-up replay while live `watch.subscribe` messages go through the debounced live path, so a restart can clear process-local dedupe while the durable cursor remains behind. I did not run a live macOS Messages restart in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This is not a ClawSweeper repair candidate because no concrete code defect was found; the blocker is contributor-supplied real iMessage restart proof plus maintainer review of cursor/backlog risk.

target.title: fix(imessage): advance catchup cursor from live messages
target.body:
Summary
- advance the iMessage catch-up cursor from safely handled live messages
- coordinate startup catch-up, live debounce/coalescing, and cursor writes so replay does not deadlock or skip backlog
- cover held/given-up retry behavior, capped catch-up pages, failed catch-up queries, coalesced source rows, and malformed startup overlap cases

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/imessage/src/monitor.catchup-cursor.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/coalesce.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup-bridge.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider*.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.catchup-cursor.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/coalesce.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/coalesce.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup-bridge.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup-bridge.test.ts docs/channels/imessage.md
- pnpm check:changed

Behavior addressed: iMessage catch-up could replay rows already handled by the live watcher after restart because the persisted catch-up cursor only advanced during catch-up.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout with focused iMessage monitor/catch-up regression tests.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: the three verification commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: tests cover live cursor advancement, no cursor regression, held and given-up retry semantics, startup fence ordering, deadlock-free catch-up replay, debounce-window overlap, failed live dispatch replay, failed catch-up query safety, perRunLimit backlog safety, and coalesced split-send row IDs.
Observed result after fix: focused iMessage tests passed, formatting passed, and changed-file typecheck/lint/guard checks passed.
What was not tested: live macOS Messages/imsg restart with a real iMessage account was not run here.

Fixes #85363
target.author: rohitjavvadi
